note: As-is baseline (before): managing/viewing work goes through the LLM in chat — /gogo:done and /gogo:view load skills, classify, render, convert and ask interactively (slow for read-only operations); state.md records only the current phase, with no timestamps or transition history for any external observer. Copied into the report bundle from charts/before/ (source: charts/before/current-llm-hot-path.mmd); file path rewritten to the report/before/ location and renamed to the kind stem flow.mmd so before/after pair by filename in the viewer.

diagrams.title: Before: LLM in the hot path of read-only work; no pipeline telemetry
